chapter5Carryover.note: Birthright continues with Kaze's exact level, rolled stat gains, and weapon proficiency from the end of Chapter 5; the displayed values are the no-gain template.

Conquest starts from the level 9 template, then adds every level gained in Chapters 4 and 5, reapplies the exact stat gains rolled on those level-ups, and adds the weapon proficiency gained there to its C-rank template.

provenance.locator: Fire Emblem Fates > Conquest > Playable; level-up carryover note

chapter5Carryover.note: Revelation restores Kaze's exact Chapter 5 level, rolled stat gains, and weapon proficiency; the displayed values are the no-gain template.
